title: Star Wars Adventures 11: Danger on Naboo
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|italics=1}} {{Otheruses|Star Wars Adventures 11}} {{Book |image=[[File:Adventures11-Book.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars Adventures 11:
Danger on Naboo'' |author=[[A. L. Singer]] |cover artist= |illustrator= |editor= |publisher=[[Scholastic]] |early release= |release date=[[August]] [[2003]]''[[Star Wars Adventures 11: Danger on Naboo]]'' was released in a bundle with [[Star Wars Adventures Magazine 11|''Star Wars Adventure Magazine'' 11]], which was released in [[August]] [[2003]] |intl release= |rereleased= |media type=Paperback |pages=73 |isbn=9780439458900 |isbn2= |isbn3= |timeline=[[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' |series=[[Star Wars Adventures (Scholastic)|''Star Wars Adventures'' (Scholastic)]] |preceded by=''[[Star Wars Adventures 10: Trouble on Tatooine|Trouble on Tatooine]]'' |followed by=''[[Star Wars Adventures 12: Podrace to Freedom|Podrace to Freedom]]'' }} '''''Star Wars Adventures 11: Danger on Naboo''''' was the ninth installment of [[Scholastic]]'s [[Star Wars Adventures (Scholastic)|''Star Wars Adventures'']] series. This book is a reprint of ''[[Episode I Adventures 13: Danger on Naboo]]''. It consisted of a young reader novel and an accompanying game book for use with the story, and was sent out with [[Star Wars Adventures Magazine 11|''Star Wars Adventures Magazine'' 11]] in [[August]] [[2003]]. ==Media== ===Cover gallery=== File:Adventures11-Book.jpg|Novel cover File:Adventures11-GameBook.jpg|Game Book cover ==Appearances== {{:Episode I Adventures 13: Danger on Naboo}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{ScholasticAdventuresNav}} {{Episode1Multimedia}} {{Interlang |ka=ვარსკვლავური ომები: თავგადასავლები 11: საფრთხე ნაბუზე }} [[Category:Star Wars Adventures books|Adventures 11]]
